text:
is an Angel that is original to the Shin Japan Heroes Universe Amusement World attraction. It was introduced in the Shin 765 Operation event. https://twitter.com/SJHA_World/status/1552489029534466049 12:00 AM · Jul 28, 2022 

Profile

A bipedal being with a long tail and spikes over the spine. It appears to have a skull over the head.

History

Shin 765 Operation

Development

Observing the illustration, it appears to be a fusion of the second form of Godzilla and parts of the design of the Third Angel of the Rebuild of Evangelion film series.

Altering the brightness of the images, can show more details to the design. https://twitter.com/EvaEx2/status/1553647577483997184
